pageContext.name: Batman (The Batman Version) Nendoroid
pageContext.description: 'I'm vengeance.'  From the movie The Batman (2022) comes a fully articulated Nendoroid of Batman! He comes with two interchangeable face plates—a standard face and an angry face—along with white eye parts that can be used with his mask! Optional parts include a letter from the Riddler, a Batmobile miniature figure, an unmasked head part and a gargoyle part that can be attached to the Nendoroid's base! Be sure to add him to your DC collection!
